scripts.lint: bun run lint:web && bun run lint:rust
scripts.lint:web: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:eslint
scripts.lint:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path packages/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path packages/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.verify: bun test && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run build && bun run check:rust
